persona: Parent choosing snacks/drinks for a child; wants quick buy/caution/avoid guidance, clear allergen and sugar evidence, and reusable saved/avoid decisions.

tasks.evidence: 成分镜 | 看食品标签，判断该不该买 | 优先拍配料表、营养表或条码；结论会标出依据和信息不足。 | 拍哪里 | 配料 / 营养 / 条码 | 直接提示补拍 | 拍照识别 | 示例结果，不是你的报告 | 来源 | 包装实拍 | 条码 | 上传识别 | 扫条码/二维码 | 手动输入

trustSignals.notes: The live UI ties decisions to packaging evidence, attention profile, missing-info recovery, and same-category comparison. For a parent snack/drink choice, allergen and sugar evidence were understandable without external help.
